title: KitchenCraft Le'Xpress Kettle Descaler/Wire Ball Limescale Remover, Stainless Steel
features: Does the inside of your kettle look like the White Cliffs of Dover? Keep it clean and protected with this limescale remover ball
No effort required: simply pop it in the kettle and it does the hard work for you, collecting limescale deposits with every use
Save cash: limescale can impact the efficiency of your kettle, so this kettle descaler could help prolong its life and save you money
Chemical free: unlike some liquid or tablet-based kettle descalers, this one contains no weird chemicals and can be used multiple times
The kettle cleaner is made of rust-proof, easy-to-clean stainless steel, and comes with a 12 month guarantee
Small steel mesh ball to prevent the build up of lime-scale in all types of kettles
Simply place the kettle collector in any type of kettle
The limescale fur will collect on the fine stainless steel wire as the water boils, keeping it free of deposits, reducing boiling time, energy costs, and prolonging the life of the kettle
description: From the manufacturer KitchenCraft Le'Xpress Kettle Limescale Remover Ball More Information: This kettle defurrer is reusable It’s a life-saver for people who live in hard water areas. And best of all, unlike descaler tablets or liquids, it can be cleaned up and used again and again! Protect your kettle from limescale for good, with the KitchenCraft Le'Xpress kettle descaler ball With minimal fuss and no effort at all, this gadget will leave your kettle spotless and free from limescale. There’s no scrubbing or weird cleaning concoctions necessary. Simply pop it in your kettle, and… that’s it! As you use the kettle, the wire ball will attract limescale, so far less ends up on the sides, or on the heating element. More Features Reusable and rust-resistant You can use this kettle limescale remover over and over again. It’s made of stainless steel, so it resists rust and is easy to clean. Just give it a rinse under running water and gently squeeze to clean away the limescale deposits. Save cash Limescale can prevent the heating element in your kettle from working effectively, meaning it requires more electricity and takes longer to boil. By ridding your kettle of limescale, this kettle protector could prolong the life of your kettle, and help you save cash in the long run. Chemical free Worried about squirting cleaning chemicals into your kettle? Unlike tablet or liquid-based descaling products, this stainless steel ball contains no chemicals, so it is kind to the environment and won’t leave anything weird behind in your next cup of tea. About Le'Xpress Le’Xpress serves that all important shot of caffeine, soothing peppermint tea, calming pot of tea and comforting mug of steaming hot chocolate. Whatever your hot drink of choice, Le’Xpress can make, serve and store them all.
